__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Crystal Piano,Holy Nail,Edison's Phonograph,Prince's Rose,Mars Rover
|rank=purple
|amount=5
|category=self
|description=Per 2k Relic Points, Snail ATK +4<br>Relic Points:90,000/90,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Relic Points]]
